metadata.captureTool: Playwright local Chromium against v0.5.0 production build
metadata.screenshotCommitDecision: PNG screenshots were captured locally under /tmp and intentionally not committed to avoid binary repository growth. This manifest commits file names, sizes, dimensions, and SHA-256 hashes so the capture set is auditable and regenerable.
metadata.captureCommitNote: Screenshots were captured after #211 merged; #211 was docs/test-only and did not change the v0.5.0 web UI baseline.

baselineTasks.title: Produce a first transcript
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Current v0.5 first-transcript baseline: user must find the stacked transcript panel, then hold Space or the push-to-talk control. Fake microphone input is used; no private audio or transcript is captured.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Hold Space or Hold to talk
accessibilityObstacles: Primary dictation task competes with adjacent model, diagnostics, benchmark, and roadmap sections on the same page.
qualitativeObservations: The correct recording control is reachable, but the default screen asks users to parse technical model/runtime status before speaking.

baselineTasks.title: Change language
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Language mode is changed from the transcript settings card; technical language-span diagnostics remain visible in the default screen.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

accessibilityObstacles: The language selector is visible, but diagnostics jargon is displayed beside the ordinary task.
qualitativeObservations: Task is short, but the current label uses implementation-oriented Auto/code-switch terminology.

baselineTasks.title: Enable a vocabulary set
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Vocabulary enablement baseline: existing set checkbox plus schema/revision and technical prompt-preview content are visible together.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Check Enable this set for future utterances
accessibilityObstacles: The enable control is surrounded by set creation, deletion, revision, schema, and prompt-preview information.
qualitativeObservations: Enablement works, but it is not presented as a compact list action.

baselineTasks.title: Add a custom term
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Custom-term baseline uses synthetic text only. Basic and expert fields are all visible in the v0.5 editor.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

accessibilityObstacles: Advanced numeric and prompt fields are visible before most users need them.
qualitativeObservations: The task can be completed, but the editor exposes expert fields in the default path.

baselineTasks.title: Create a voice model and begin enrollment
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Current create-model/enrollment entry is the microphone/enrollment panel rather than a focused model-creation route. Fake microphone input is used.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Use Personal Models navigation or scroll to Microphone panel
accessibilityObstacles: Model creation, microphone calibration, and enrollment are not a one-question-per-screen flow.
qualitativeObservations: The existing panel is capable but dense; a first-time user must infer that this is the model-creation entry.

baselineTasks.title: Resume an enrollment
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Enrollment resume baseline after reload. One synthetic fake-microphone take is accepted into local profile storage for evidence only.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Confirm profile store resumed accepted takes
accessibilityObstacles: Resume state appears in a technical profile-storage section rather than a model workflow step.
qualitativeObservations: Persistence works after reload, but the recovery affordance is not a focused enrollment screen.

baselineTasks.title: Begin training when ready
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: v0.5 training entry baseline is the browser training prototype/runtime panel with technical status visible by default.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Scroll to Model runtime and browser training
accessibilityObstacles: Training is mixed with runtime diagnostics and ORT spike details.
qualitativeObservations: The prototype is keyboard-accessible and resumable, but its default context is highly technical.

baselineTasks.title: Interpret a passing or failing candidate
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Candidate interpretation baseline: activation review/result interpretation is aggregate-only but spread across Personal Models and runtime sections.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Review activation gates and rollback summary
accessibilityObstacles: Candidate interpretation is split between runtime status and Personal Models activation review.
qualitativeObservations: Aggregate gate language exists, but v0.6 should provide an outcome-first result route.

baselineTasks.title: Export a personal model
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Profile export baseline uses an explicit local download and labels the package as sensitive voice data.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

accessibilityObstacles: Export is available, but it is embedded in the microphone/enrollment panel rather than a focused export route.
qualitativeObservations: The sensitive-data warning is visible and accurate.

baselineTasks.title: Import a personal model
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: Profile import baseline validates checksums locally through the profile store worker; the exported file is synthetic fake-microphone evidence from this run.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Delete current synthetic profile for a clean import
accessibilityObstacles: Import uses a file input inside the dense profile-storage area rather than a dedicated step-by-step route.
qualitativeObservations: Checksum validation is clear after completion; pre-validation steps are not separated.

baselineTasks.title: Delete all local speech data
baselineTasks.evidenceMode: local Playwright capture with fake microphone and synthetic profile/vocabulary data

screenshot.note: v0.5 has profile-specific deletion here; no single task-first delete-all-local-speech-data route exists yet.

metrics.countBasis: Manual count from the shortest visible v0.5 path exercised by the local capture script; hover-only alternatives are not counted.

completionPath: Use profile-storage delete for the local profile
Confirm stored accepted takes return to zero
accessibilityObstacles: No single Storage/Privacy route gathers all local speech data deletion consequences.
qualitativeObservations: Profile deletion works, but delete-all local speech data is distributed across panels and should move to a dedicated Storage/Privacy screen.

notes: Counts are a baseline observation of the current v0.5 stacked UI, not a usability-study result.
Screenshots use fake microphone input, a synthetic vocabulary term, and a synthetic exported profile created during the capture run.
No telemetry, remote analytics, private audio, private transcript, private vocabulary, or real profile data was used.

requiredV06FollowUps: Replace the stacked single-page baseline with task-first routes before comparing final task-efficiency gates.
Use moderated participant evidence in later usability-study issues; this baseline is a local audit artifact only.
Keep screenshots or regenerated visual artifacts out of CI logs when they could contain user-provided transcripts or profile names.
